investors: Bertelsmann India Investments | Mirae Asset Venture Investments | Susquehanna VC
summary: Snabbit, a quick home services platform, raised $56 million in a Series D round from Susquehanna VC, Mirae Asset Venture Investments, and Bertelsmann India Investments to expand into new cities and strengthen its operations.

STCH, a Bengaluru-based textile tech startup, raised $5.5 million in a pre-Series A round led by Omnivore, with participation from Kae Capital and WVC, to expand its AI-driven fabric R&D and manufacturing platform.

investors: Blume Ventures | CRED | Peak XV Partners
summary: Consumer AI startup M (Curious Digital Pvt Ltd) raised Rs 108 crore in a Series Seed round led by Peak XV Partners with participation from Blume Ventures and CRED.

investors: ITI Growth Opportunities Fund | Merisis Wealth Trust | PROMAFT Partners | V3 Ventures
summary: The Hosteller, a Mumbai-based hostel chain, raised Rs 150 crore in a Series B round led by PROMAFT Partners, with participation from V3 Ventures, ITI Growth Opportunities Fund and Merisis Wealth Trust, to expand its travel super app and increase its property footprint.

Pluckk, a digital-first fresh food and clean-label FMCG brand, raised Rs 100 crore in a Series A round led by Euro Gulf Investment to expand offline retail, international markets, and AI-driven supply chain capabilities.
GobbleCube secured a $15 million Series A round backed by Susqueanna Venture Capital.
Palmonas, a demi-fine jewellery startup, raised $40 million in a Series B round led by Xponentia Capital with participation from Vertex Ventures.

summary: Metasports Interactive, a mobile gaming company behind the cricket game Hitwicket, secured $20 million in non-dilutive user acquisition funding from growth financing firm Metica to scale marketing and international expansion.
IndiGo Ventures Fund invested about Rs 10 crore in Sarla Aviation, an eVTOL air-taxi startup, to support its operating and expansion needs.
Healthcare automation startup Coral raised $12.5 million from Z47 and Lightspeed Venture Partners in an early-stage funding round.
Capital-A announced the first close of its second fund at Rs 160 crore, anchored by several indigenous investors.
The article reports Unicommerce's Q4 FY26 revenue, profit and financial metrics, without mentioning a funding round.
Amazon India announced a Rs 2,800 crore (≈$300 million) investment to expand its logistics and quick commerce infrastructure across the country.
Groww reported Q4 FY26 profit of Rs 686 crore and revenue of Rs 1,500 crore, with details on earnings and client growth.
The Indian government announced a Rs 10,000 crore Fund of Funds 2.0 to support deep‑tech, manufacturing and early‑growth startups through segmented AIFs.
Masters’ Union launched a Rs 100 crore early-stage investment platform, MU Ventures, to fund founders under 25 across various tracks.
ZoloStays reported FY25 revenue of Rs 342.3 crore with improved margins but remained loss‑making; the article does not announce a new funding round.
Bluestone, an omnichannel jewellery retailer, reported a 48% YoY revenue increase to Rs 681 crore in Q4 FY26 and posted a profit of Rs 31 crore.
